name: catarman-dog-pound-animal-shelter-management-system
description: Vanilla PHP 8.2 application scaffolded from the local PRD and implementation guide.

scripts.tooling:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); ['beautiful-mermaid','@resvg/resvg-js','docx'].forEach((name)=>{const packageFile=path.join(process.cwd(),'node_modules',...name.split('/'),'package.json'); if(!fs.existsSync(packageFile)){throw new Error('Missing dependency: ' + name);} }); console.log('Optional Node tooling dependencies are installed.');"
